ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bonds" (
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond */,
  "cusip_id" TEXT /* CUSIP identifier for the bond */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the bond was issued */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the bond matures */,
  "face_value" REAL /* Face value of the bond */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate of the bond */,
  "issuer_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity issuing the bond */,
  "issuer_country" TEXT /* Country of the bond issuer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the bond is denominated */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the bond */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield data point */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bond */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the yield was recorded */,
  "yield_point" REAL /* Yield point for the bond */,
  "time_to_maturity_days" INTEGER /* Time to maturity in days */,
  "time_to_maturity_years" REAL /* Time to maturity in years */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the yield data */,
  "market_sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the bond belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_yields_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the bond yield data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the bond yield data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the market condition was recorded */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Current interest rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Current inflation rate */,
  "economic_indicators" TEXT /* Other relevant economic indicators */,
  "economic_growth_rate" REAL /* Current economic growth rate */,
  "political_stability_index" REAL /* Index indicating political stability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield prediction */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bond */,
  "date_predicted" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_yield" REAL /* Predicted yield for the bond */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "forecast_horizon" INTEGER /* Number of days the prediction covers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst note */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bond */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who made the note */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the note was recorded */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the analyst's note */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_notes_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_notes_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trader_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader action */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bond */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader who took the action */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of bonds involved in the action */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the action was taken */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee incurred for the transaction */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trader_actions_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trader_actions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
